zh.lifeSummary: 當Augustine de Stratton ESQ於1374年出生在英國素福爾可紹特利時，他的父親Walter de Stratton26歲，母親Cecily Walter22歲。他於1399年與Margareth Jenney在英國素福爾可紹特利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1450年在他的家鄉享年76歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可紹特利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stratton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Stratton or Stretton, almost all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, Roman road’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. Stratton in Cornwall, which may also be a partial source of the surname, probably has as its first element Cornish stras ‘valley’.

English: variant of Sturton, a habitational name from Sturton le Steeple (Nottinghamshire), Great Sturton (Lincolnshire), Sturton by Stow (Lincolnshire), or possibly Sturton (Northumberland), all of which placenames share the same etymology and early spellings as 1 above.

Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘street, Roman road’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Straiton
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, street’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Stratton .

nameMeanings.name: Augustine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Latin name Augustinus (a derivative of Augustus ). Its most famous bearer is St Augustine of Hippo ( 354–430 ), perhaps the greatest of the Fathers of the Christian Church. He formulated the principles followed by the numerous medieval communities named after him as Austin canons, friars, and nuns. Also important in England was St Augustine of Canterbury, who brought Christianity to Kent in the 6th century. See also Austin .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Augustine de Stratton ESQ was born in 1374, in Shotley, Suffolk, England, his father, Walter de Stratton, was 26 and his mother, Cecily Walter, was 22. He married Margareth Jenney in 1399, in Shotley, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1450, in his hometown, at the age of 76, and was buried in Shotley, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Augustine de Stratton ESQ est né en 1374, à Shotley, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Stratton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Cecily Walter, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margareth Jenney en 1399, à Shotley, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1450, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Shotley, Suffolk, Angleterre.

Er hat 1399 in Shotley, Suffolk, England Margareth Jenney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. ko.lifeSummary: Augustine de Stratton ESQ(이)가 1374년 영국 수폴크 쇼틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Stratton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Walter(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1399년 영국 수폴크 쇼틀리에서 Margareth Jenney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1450년 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 쇼틀리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Augustine de Stratton ESQ родился в 1374 г. в местности шотли, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter de Stratton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Walter, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margareth Jenney в 1399 г. в местности шотли, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1450 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности шотли, суффолк, Англия.
